meta.tagline: Shop in the USA and China. WWT delivers it to your home or office.
meta.defaultDescription: Receive your US and China purchases at your own mailbox address and get them delivered in Paraguay or Argentina. Storage, personal shopper service, repacking, and air and sea shipping.

hero.headlinePrefix: Shop in the USA and China.
hero.subheadline: Get your own US address, shop at any store you like, and we'll store, repack and ship your packages straight to your door in Paraguay or Argentina.
hero.trustNote: Over a decade helping families and businesses shop abroad.

whyChooseUs.title: Why choose WWT
whyChooseUs.subtitle: International logistics with competitive rates, clear tracking, and personal support on every shipment.

items.title: Secure parcel handling
items.description: We store and dispatch your goods with warehouse controls and updates at every shipping stage.

items.title: Reliable delivery options
items.description: Air and sea services to balance speed and cost based on how urgent your cargo is.

items.description: A Paraguay-based team available via WhatsApp, email, and the client portal.

items.title: Transparent rates
items.description: Clear quotes by weight and volume with no hidden fees on your shipping solutions.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps between your US purchase and delivery at your door.

steps.title: Sign up and get your mailbox
steps.description: Create your free account and we'll assign you your own US address for your purchases.

steps.title: Shop at any store
steps.description: Use your WWT address on Amazon, eBay, Shein, Chinese stores or any retailer you like, with or without your own credit card.
steps.imageLabel: Shop online and ship to WWT

steps.title: We receive and inspect
steps.description: Your package arrives at our warehouse, we inspect it and notify you by WhatsApp and email.

steps.title: We repack and ship
steps.description: We consolidate your packages to lower the cost and ship them by air or sea straight to your address.

hero.title: Services built for international shoppers
hero.subtitle: From your first purchase to delivery at your door, we're with you every step of the way.

cover.imageAlt: WWT international distribution and logistics center

hero.title: Clear rates, no surprises
hero.subtitle: Your shipping cost depends on weight, volume and the type of service you choose.

factors.title: Weight and volume
factors.description: We charge based on whichever is greater: the actual weight (kg) or the volumetric weight (cbm) of your package.

factors.title: Purchase origin
factors.description: Rates vary depending on whether your purchase comes from the US, China or Spain.

factors.title: Shipping type
factors.description: Air shipping is faster; sea shipping is more economical for larger volumes.

factors.title: Extra services
factors.description: Inspection, special repacking or personal shopper service may carry an additional cost.

aboutPage.title: About WWT
aboutPage.intro: World Wide Trading Group was created to solve a simple problem: shopping in the US and China from Paraguay and Argentina shouldn't be complicated.

cover.imageAlt: Global logistics port and international trade

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: Connect our customers with stores around the world, offering their own mailbox, secure storage and reliable shipping to their door at home or the office.

items.title: Transparency
items.description: Clear rates and constant communication about the status of every package.

items.title: Personal attention
items.description: Direct support over WhatsApp and email at every stage of the shipment.

items.title: Care
items.description: We inspect and repack carefully so your purchase arrives in good condition.

faqPage.title: Frequently asked questions
faqPage.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about mailboxes, purchases and shipping.

items.question: Do I need a credit card to shop in the US?
items.answer: Not necessarily. With our personal shopper service, we can make the purchase on your behalf at the store you choose.

items.question: How do I get my US address?
items.answer: When you sign up and create your mailbox, we automatically assign you your own address that you can use at any online store.

items.question: How long does shipping take?
items.answer: Air shipping is usually faster, while sea shipping is more economical but has longer transit times. Exact timing depends on origin and volume.

items.question: Can I consolidate several packages into one shipment?
items.answer: Yes. You can accumulate your purchases at our warehouse and ask us to repack them together to save on total shipping cost.

items.question: How do I track my package?
items.answer: You can use the waybill number in the Tracking section of our site, or log in to the client portal for full details.

items.question: What if I need to return a product?
items.answer: Contact us via WhatsApp or email and we'll coordinate the return to the original store.

contactPage.title: Let's talk
contactPage.subtitle: Message us on WhatsApp or email and we'll get back to you shortly.

form.name: Full name
form.success: Message sent. We'll get back to you shortly.

trustedPartner.title: Your trusted logistics partner
trustedPartner.description: At WWT Group we provide international shipping and logistics solutions to support your purchases abroad. Whether you shop in the USA or China, need your own mailbox, want to consolidate packages or track a shipment, we guide you with a personal, transparent and results-driven service.

serviceCategories.title: Service areas
serviceCategories.subtitle: Everything you need to shop, store and receive your packages in Paraguay and Argentina.

consultationSection.title: Online consultation
consultationSection.description: Use our contact form to tell us about your shipment, quote request or logistics enquiry. We'll get back to you shortly by email or WhatsApp.
consultationSection.note: Typical response time: one business day.

servicesPage.description: From cargo planes and container ships to our delivery fleet, we choose the right transport for your timeline and budget.

faqPage.description: Shopping abroad raises questions about rates, timelines and paperwork. Our team is available to guide you through every step.
